data.title: This Crypto Analyst Predicts Bitcoin Could Soar 137% Under Perfect Market Conditions
data.description: Cryptocurrency analyst Benjamin Cowen has proposed that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could potentially see a 137% increase in a perfect market scenario.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki's Bitcoin Forecast: Could $1 Million Be Realistic?
data.description: Robert Kiyosaki, the well-known entrepreneur and author, has predicted that Bitcoin’s price will soon exceed $1 million.

data.title: Maryland Senator Grabs National Spotlight With El Salvador Meeting With Deportee
data.description: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.), a longtime but mostly low-profile legislator, has surged into the national spotlight following a trip to El Salvador to meet with Kilmar Abrego Garcia.

data.title: 'Video Arcades? Thanks Boomer'—Grant Cardone Shares Seven Passive Income Ideas, And People Are Amused
Consumer Tech News (Apr 14-Apr 18): Trump's 125% China Tariff Sidesteps Consumer Tech, Tesla Model Y Spotted in India & More
data.description: Trump excludes China-made tech products from tariffs, reducing scope of levies. Tesla's Musk and Meta's Zuckerberg voice clips hacked in California. Rivian boasts US-centric supply chain.
